name: Korean BBQ Tofu
recipeIngredient: 4 cloves garlic or 1/2 tsp Garlic powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare vegetables of your choice for garnish.
2. Cut tofu into strips, about 1/2 inch thick.
3. Marinate the tofu in the mixture of soy sauce, sugar, dry mustard, garlic, and onion powder for at least 2 hours (overnight is best).
4. Fry the marinated tofu until crispy.
5. Garnish with vegetables of your choice and serve.
